title: Joy Boy’s Drums Begin to Echo
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Momonosuke, Zunesha, Unknown person #13, Luffy, Kaido as The rooftop battle turns desperate as Luffy falls and Zunesha links his return to Joy Boy.

dialogue.text: I can hear the drums of liberation...
